_note: Per-tenant Okta OIDC endpoints. Replace {org} with the Okta org subdomain (e.g. dev-123456). These are the Org Authorization Server endpoints (v1 path). For a Custom Authorization Server, use https://{org}.okta.com/oauth2/{authServerId}/v1/* instead. The 'default' custom authorization server uses 'default' as the authServerId. Custom domains may replace {org}.okta.com with your own domain. See also okta-base.json for the login.okta.com global endpoints.
